name: com.austephnerllc.auxtensions
description: Helpful extensions for common types in C# Unity development.

changeHistory.1.3.1: Added MonoBehaviour extensions (e.g. InvokeWhenTrue) accessible via 'this' in-class.
changeHistory.1.2.0: Added new extensions for various types.
changeHistory.1.1.3: Added common Vector3 operations for continuous value chaining.
changeHistory.1.1.0: Added quaternion extensions, additional Vector3/float/object extensions.
changeHistory.1.0.19: Fixed wrong list reference for list extension method.
changeHistory.1.0.18: Fixed ShuffleToNew IList extension, added SwapElementsAt IList extension.
changeHistory.1.0.15: Version increment, reformatted object extensions documentation.
changeHistory.1.0.13: Added list, float, Vector3, string, generic, IList, and IEnumerable extensions. Updated quaternion documentation.
changeHistory.1.0.2: Reformatted comments, added new extension classes, changed some existing extension methods.
changeHistory.1.0.1: Added game object and list extensions, shuffle fix, added TryFromJson.
